poster.recruitment.headline:
Your HR Manager Read 500 Resumes Today.
She Missed the Best One.
poster.recruitment.body: Every resume looks the same now. AI wrote half of them. Your team spends hours skimming — and still lets the right person slip through. Flame Source OS scores every application in seconds. Only the candidates worth meeting reach your desk.
poster.finance.headline:
Your Finance Team Closes the Books.
It Takes Three People and a Prayer.
poster.finance.body: Payroll. Reconciliation. Invoicing. Forty hours a month of copy-paste-check-repeat — and someone still keys in the wrong number. Flame Source OS runs the entire cycle automatically. No manual entry. No late nights. No corrections email the next morning.
poster.music.headline:
He Wrote the Song in One Night.
The Arrangement Took Three Weeks.
poster.music.body: The melody is done. Then comes the real grind — layering instruments, tweaking the mix, waiting on collaborators. For Singapore artists, that gap kills momentum and revenue. Flame Source OS handles arrangement and instrumentation in days, not weeks. The sound stays yours.
poster.restaurant.headline:
"Less Oil. More Done. No Chili."
Your Burmese Server Understood
Every Word.
poster.restaurant.body: Your staff learn dish names fast — that's the easy part. The killer is "less salt", "crispier", "cook it more". AR smart glasses give your server real-time subtitles of exactly what the customer said — no awkward translation pauses, just a natural conversation. Off the floor, the AI teacher app drills them on real requests until the glasses become a safety net, not a crutch.
poster.sales.headline:
Her First Week on the Floor.
She Sold Like a Ten-Year Veteran.
poster.sales.body: New salespeople fail because no one is beside them when it matters. Flame Source OS listens to every customer conversation in real time and coaches your rep on what to say next. Like having your best sales manager in every room. Available 24/7 for practice.
hero.headline: We Build AI That Works.
hero.sub: Your team wastes 40% of its time on work a machine should do.
hero.sub2: Flame Source OS fixes that — one workflow at a time.
gap.label: The Problem
gap.title:
Everyone Has AI.
Nobody Gets Results.
gap.body1: You bought the tools. You hired the people. Six months later, the chatbot answers four questions and your ops team still runs on spreadsheets. The models are powerful. The problem is nobody wired them to your actual business.
gap.body2: The gap is not intelligence. It is execution. You do not need another dashboard or another pilot programme. You need AI that touches the work — payroll, screening, ordering, translation — and delivers a number your CFO can see.
gap.stat: of enterprise AI projects never make it to production
product.label: Flame Source OS
product.title:
You Describe the Problem.
We Ship the Solution.
product.desc: An AI operating system that orchestrates models, tools, and workflows — so your team focuses on decisions, not configuration.
product.f1.title: Model Routing
product.f1.body: Automatically selects the right AI model for each task — balancing speed, accuracy, and cost. No manual prompt tuning. No model lock-in.
product.f2.title: Skill Library
product.f2.body: Pre-built, domain-specific skills for recruitment, finance, content, translation, and more. Each skill encodes expert logic — not just prompts.
product.f3.title: Zero Prompt Engineering
product.f3.body: Describe the outcome you need in plain language. The OS handles decomposition, tool selection, error recovery, and quality checks.
cap.label: Under the Hood
cap.title: What Powers Flame Source OS
cap.desc: Three layers of capability that make the operating system work.
cap.c1.title: AI Orchestration
cap.c1.body: Multi-model routing, task decomposition, and autonomous error recovery. The OS picks the right model, chains the right tools, and verifies every output before delivery.
cap.c2.title: Integration Engineering
cap.c2.body: Connectors to ERPs, CRMs, databases, and custom APIs. We wire AI into your existing stack — no rip-and-replace, no six-month migration.
cap.c3.title: Intelligent Hardware
cap.c3.body: When software alone isn't enough, we design IoT sensors and edge devices that feed real-world data directly into the AI pipeline. 34 patents. 150+ countries.
team.label: Team
team.title: Who We Are
team.wu.bio: Co-founded GameSir, a consumer electronics brand in 150+ countries. Holds 34 patents in precision sensing and wireless technology. B.Eng., South China University of Technology.
team.chen.bio: years in software engineering. Former CTO leading a 100+ engineer team, delivering products with RMB 100M+ monthly revenue. Specialist in distributed systems and AI automation.
team.leonard.bio: Singaporean entrepreneur applying AI to real business problems. Built AI marketing automation and digital ordering platforms for local F&B. B.Com (Marketing), University College Dublin.
contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Let's Talk
privacy.label: Legal
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: When you contact us through our website, we collect the personal data you provide: your name, email address, and message content.
privacy.p2: We collect and use your personal data solely for the purpose of responding to your enquiry and communicating with you about our services.
privacy.p3: For any data protection related queries, please contact us at info@flamesource.ai.
privacy.p4: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal data to third parties.
privacy.p5: Enquiry data is retained for a maximum of 12 months, after which it is securely deleted.
privacy.p6: Under the PDPA, you may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data, or withdraw consent. Contact us at info@flamesource.ai.
